'''tojalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:oidioid|oidioid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-j-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oidioid|oidioid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tojalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tojalithi|tojalithi]] || [[word:tojaliji|tojaliji]] || [[word:tojalishi|tojalishi]] || [[word:tojaliki|tojaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tojaluthuthu|tojaluthuthu]] || [[word:tojalujuju|tojalujuju]] || [[word:tojalushushu|tojalushushu]] || [[word:tojalukuku|tojalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tojaluthu|tojaluthu]] || [[word:tojaluju|tojaluju]] || [[word:tojalushu|tojalushu]] || [[word:tojaluku|tojaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tojalufthuf|tojalufthuf]] || [[word:tojalufjuf|tojalufjuf]] || [[word:tojalufshuf|tojalufshuf]] || [[word:tojalufkuf|tojalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tojalethe|tojalethe]] || [[word:tojaleje|tojaleje]] || [[word:tojaleshe|tojaleshe]] || [[word:tojaleke|tojaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tojalothotho|tojalothotho]] || [[word:tojalojojo|tojalojojo]] || [[word:tojaloshosho|tojaloshosho]] || [[word:tojalokoko|tojalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tojalotho|tojalotho]] || [[word:tojalojo|tojalojo]] || [[word:tojalosho|tojalosho]] || [[word:tojaloko|tojaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tojalofthof|tojalofthof]] || [[word:tojalofjof|tojalofjof]] || [[word:tojalofshof|tojalofshof]] || [[word:tojalofkof|tojalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tojalÃŸfthÃŸf|tojalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tojalÃŸfjÃŸf|tojalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tojalÃŸfshÃŸf|tojalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tojalÃŸfkÃŸf|tojalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tojalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|tojalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tojalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|tojalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tojalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|tojalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tojalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|tojalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tojalÃŸfthÃŸf|tojalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tojalÃŸfjÃŸf|tojalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tojalÃŸfshÃŸf|tojalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tojalÃŸfkÃŸf|tojalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tojalÃŸfthÃŸf|tojalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:tojalÃŸfjÃŸf|tojalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:tojalÃŸfshÃŸf|tojalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:tojalÃŸfkÃŸf|tojalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tojalÃḊthÃḊ|tojalÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:tojalÃḊjÃḊ|tojalÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:tojalÃḊshÃḊ|tojalÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:tojalÃḊkÃḊ|tojalÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tojalathatha|tojalathatha]] || [[word:tojalajaja|tojalajaja]] || [[word:tojalashasha|tojalashasha]] || [[word:tojalakaka|tojalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tojalatha|tojalatha]] || [[word:tojalaja|tojalaja]] || [[word:tojalasha|tojalasha]] || [[word:tojalaka|tojalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tojalafthaf|tojalafthaf]] || [[word:tojalafjaf|tojalafjaf]] || [[word:tojalafshaf|tojalafshaf]] || [[word:tojalafkaf|tojalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tojalasha|tojalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tojalshÃḋsha|tojalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tojalrosha|tojalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tojalmusha|tojalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tojalyasha|tojalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotojalnkshÃḋsha|gotojalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotojalnkrosha|gotojalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotojalnkmusha|gotojalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotojalnkyasha|gotojalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tojajalasha|tojajalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tojajalshÃḋsha|tojajalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tojajalrosha|tojajalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tojajalmusha|tojajalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tojajalyasha|tojajalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotojajalnkshÃḋsha|gotojajalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotojajalnkrosha|gotojajalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotojajalnkmusha|gotojajalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotojajalnkyasha|gotojajalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tejÃḊlasha|tejÃḊlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tejÃḊlshÃḋsha|tejÃḊlshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tejÃḊlrosha|tejÃḊlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tejÃḊlmusha|tejÃḊlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tejÃḊlyasha|tejÃḊlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotejÃḊlnkshÃḋsha|gotejÃḊlnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotejÃḊlnkrosha|gotejÃḊlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotejÃḊlnkmusha|gotejÃḊlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotejÃḊlnkyasha|gotejÃḊlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tojfalasha|tojfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tojfalshÃḋsha|tojfalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tojfalrosha|tojfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tojfalmusha|tojfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tojfalyasha|tojfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotojfalnkshÃḋsha|gotojfalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotojfalnkrosha|gotojfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotojfalnkmusha|gotojfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotojfalnkyasha|gotojfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
